title: Dramatic Smoky Syrian Peas Pilaf
description: A funky and energizing Syrian dish featuring smoky peas, this pilaf is perfect for a weeknight dinner, with its crisp texture and ayurvedic-tamasic friendly ingredients. It is cooked to perfection in a kadhai vessel.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kadhai vessel over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for a few seconds.
Add the basmati rice and stir to coat the rice with the oil and spices.
Add the green peas, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in the lemon juice.
